meaning: n.特别重的人(或物),最重量级拳击手(或摔交手),聪明绝顶的人
examples: The heavyweight champion will be given a shot at Holyfield's world title.
They are like heavyweight boxers, trying to psych each other out and build themselves up.
Rocky's goal in the first "Rocky" is to stand side by side with the American heavyweight black boxing champion Apollo Creed.
Both repeatedly won the most prestigious heavyweight boxing championships, such as WBC, IBF, and WBO.
It has, however, attracted some heavyweight partners, including GE Energy and Whiting-Turner Contracting Co.
